seo.meta_title: Mount Rinjani Trek Packages — Sembalun & Senaru Routes | Go2Rinjani
seo.meta_description: Explore all Mount Rinjani trek packages with Go2Rinjani — 2, 3, and 4-day itineraries across Sembalun and Senaru routes. Summit climbs, crater rim hikes, and Segara Anak lake descents for all levels.

hero.title: Mount Rinjani Trek — Choose Your Route & Duration
hero.desc: Go2Rinjani offers six guided Mount Rinjani trek packages across two iconic routes — Sembalun and Senaru. Whether you are chasing the summit at 3,726 m, descending to Segara Anak lake, or hiking the crater rim, every trek is fully supported by certified local guides, porters, and permits.

routes.title: Sembalun Route
routes.desc: The Sembalun Route approaches Mount Rinjani from the east through open savannah landscapes and traditional Sasak farmland — offering the most direct path to the summit at 3,726 m. All Sembalun packages include the option to add the Torean Route on the descent for an extended expedition.

packages.title: Crater Rim & Summit
highlights: Crater rim views over Segara Anak lake

packages.title: Full Sembalun Expedition
highlights: Extended time at Segara Anak lake

routes.title: Senaru Route
routes.desc: The Senaru Route approaches Mount Rinjani from the west through dense tropical rainforest and the ancient Sasak village of Senaru — a lush, immersive trail ideal for trekkers who want to experience the full biodiversity of Rinjani National Park.

packages.title: Crater Rim Senaru
highlights: Panoramic views over Segara Anak lake
No summit — suitable for all fitness levels

items.title: Certified Local Guides
items.desc: Every Mount Rinjani trek is led by certified local guides born and raised in the villages surrounding Rinjani National Park — guides who know every trail, every campsite, and every story the mountain holds.

items.title: Fully Supported Treks
items.desc: Go2Rinjani handles all permits, porters, camping equipment, and meals — so you arrive, trek, and summit without logistics stress. Every trekker is fully supported from trailhead to finish.

items.title: All Experience Levels Welcome
items.desc: From first-time hikers tackling the Senaru crater rim to experienced mountaineers pushing for the summit at 3,726 m — Go2Rinjani has a Mount Rinjani trek package suited to your fitness and goals.

items.title: Responsible Trekking
items.desc: Go2Rinjani is committed to the conservation of Mount Rinjani National Park and the welfare of local Sasak porters and communities — a portion of every trek contributes directly to trail conservation efforts.

cta.title: Ready to Hike Mount Rinjani?
cta.desc: Choose your route, pick your duration, and let Go2Rinjani handle the rest. Six Mount Rinjani trek packages — one mountain, endless stories.
